slides.body: A new study by Anaxi and Carnegie Mellon explores how to value AI training data and establish clear revenue models. This addresses challenges in the internet economy's advertising model as AI systems become more interconnected.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalistic layout with black/white base and blue accent. Left-aligned text. Structured, clean design.
slides.source_topic_headline: Anaxi, Carnegie Mellon study AI data value, revenue models

slides.body: A TechRadar report suggests treating AI agents as junior engineers. This approach ensures safer and more productive use, acknowledging their capabilities while mitigating risks from inconsistent results in areas like cybersecurity.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalistic layout with black/white base and orange accent. Left-aligned text. Structured, clean design.
slides.source_topic_headline: Treating AI Agents as Junior Engineers: Oversight for Productivity and Safety
